map.name: map
map.desc: An electronic map with digital compass compatibility.

shroom.name: shroom
shroom.desc: An acidic alien mushroom with vivid colors.

gun.name: gun
gun.desc: A high-tech wormhole blaster made of glass.

scripture.name: scripture
scripture.desc: An ancient text containing alien scripture.

cavern.name: cavern
cavern.desc:
You awaken on the cold, hard ground - your clothes soaking wet. You feel sluggish.. and disoriented.

"Where the Hell am I?" you think to yourself in a haze.

As your senses begin to return, you realize you're lying in an almost pitch-black, unfamiliar place and have no idea how you got there.

"Help!" you scream. "Help! Hel-" You stop yourself as confusion quickly turns into primal fear.

You jump onto your feet and paralyzing dread starts resonating throughout your entire body.

You notice a small, dimly lit passageway up ahead. Your head instantly responds - Run.
cavern.alt_desc:
You are back in the damp cavern where you first woke up.
The only way out is to the north.

entryway.name: entryway
entryway.desc:
Which way do I go?

The path to the south leads back to the cavern.
To the west you see a path full of leaves and vines.
To the east you see a big stainless steel door.

east.msg: The stainless steel door to the east is rusted shut. If only you had something to get through it...
east.success_msg: You squeeze the acidic SHROOM over the hinges. The rust dissolves and the heavy door opens!

garden.name: garden
garden.desc:
Weird alien mushrooms growing everywhere! The vivid colors! All the different species.
It's truly magnificent. Maybe I should pick up just one for the road.
There are paths branching off to the west and north.

north.msg:
A wall of thick, pulsating vines that are many feet in diamter blocks the path north to the pond.
They're way too thick to cut. "You're gonna need something that packs a punch."
north.success_msg:
You use the GUN to blast a smoldering hole straight through the thick vines!
The path is clear.

mud_pit.name: mud_pit
mud_pit.desc:
You trudge into a disgusting, thick mud pit. The smell is awful.
It's a complete dead end, and now your shoes are ruined.

freezer.name: freezer
freezer.desc:
So cold. And dark. What is this place? Oh my God. Are those... human corpses?!
There's a sign that says "Fresh Earthling Meat".
There are exits leading east and north. I'd better keep moving...

storage.name: storage
storage.desc:
A large all-white storage room with shelves. Most of the shelves just contain old junk: a yellow-haired bobble head with the number '101' printed on his jumpsuit (or 'her's' - I shouldn't assume). jumpsuit. Cute. They should put that in a video game.
And a dismantled Roomba! Such ancient Boomer technology lulz.
What else is here?

pink_pond.name: pink_pond
pink_pond.desc:
I've never seen water like this before! That fish! What is that?!
I could surely make some delicious fish paste out of one of those!
A path to the north continues, but a heavy iron gate blocks the way.

north.msg: A heavy iron gate blocks the path north. It has a rusty keyhole.
north.success_msg: You insert the KEY and turn it. The heavy iron gate creaks open!

laboratory.name: laboratory
laboratory.desc:
You walk into some sort of science lab. Beakers and flasks and things everywhere.
A half-human, half-worm thing. Disgusting.
But such intricate gadgets and gizmos hang on the wall.
There's a door to the north, but a massive, pulsating bio-plant is blocking it.

north.msg: A hungry, mutated plant covers the door to the north. It snaps its jaws at you.
north.success_msg:
You toss the alien FISH to the mutant plant. It eats it happily and soon becomes dormant.
You run.

graveyard.name: graveyard
graveyard.desc:
Looks like things have been buried down here.
What is that? It's some kind of ancient text.
It says, 'If you've collected more than seven, then straight ahead lies Heaven. Otherwise, you're worm food.'
Hmm. Weird. An eerie tunnel continues north.

dump.name: dump
dump.desc:
That smell! What is that awful, rancid scent? Wait... I'd recognize that smell anywhere.
It's poop. And not just any poop. Alien. Worm. Poop. Of course!
A sign on the wall reads, "You're getting worm-er." A poop pun.
I'm too tired for puns. In fact... I'm pooped. A tunnel leads north.
